Interface IMosaicDatasetOperationParameters3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters to an operation on a mosaic dataset.

[Guid("0F656CEF-47B0-46DC-A9FA-BE3C31103086")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IMosaicDatasetOperationParameters3 : IMosaicDatasetOperationParameters2, IMosaicDatasetOperationParameters

Indicates whether the geodatabase data dictionary should be refreshed by the operation.
